headline: The Cost Of McDonald's First Happy Meal Deal May Not Be What You'd Expect
summary: McDonald's Happy Meal is an iconic meal combo that costs between $5 and $7 today. You may be surprised by how much the meal cost back when it launched in 1979.

raw.headline: The Cost Of McDonald's First Happy Meal Deal May Not Be What You'd Expect
raw.summary: McDonald's Happy Meal is an iconic meal combo that costs between $5 and $7 today. You may be surprised by how much the meal cost back when it launched in 1979.

headline: Surprise! America Has Chosen Its Favorite Fast-Food Restaurant -- and It's Not Wendy's or Burger King!
summary: A digital transformation and a commitment to its core products have made it clear that this brand-name quick-serve restaurant chain isn't clowning around.

headline: 3 Market Segments I'm Targeting When Iran War Ends
summary: IWM gives broad small-cap exposure hit by oil-price shocks. XLY stands to benefit when oil prices drop, as will JETS. Read here for more analysis.

headline: GLP-1 drugs are changing how Americans eat. Food companies are racing to catch up
summary: For restaurants and food companies, the increasing adoption of GLP-1 drugs present both an opportunity and a threat to their businesses.

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats As Of March 20, 2026
